name: forward_message
description:
Forward an email to new recipients. Fetches the original message and sends it with
a '---------- Forwarded message ----------' header including the original sender, date, subject.

Optionally prepend a note above the forwarded content using additional_message.

message_id.description: Message ID of the email to forward (from gmail_search or gmail_get_message)

additional_message.description: Optional note to prepend above the forwarded content
